title: Monorepo scaffold, layered config, MCP server skeleton, CI
selection_reason: deterministic scaffold bead, single domain, user-directed codex implementation with claude supervision
validations: tools/list: 10 tools default, 9 with apply_edits disabled
notes: Supervisor independently re-ran all gates. SDK returns isError:true on schema violations (asserted in tests). gpt-5.5-fast unsupported on this account; used gpt-5.5 medium effort.

title: File catalog, ignore stack, iOS preset, cache substrate, index CLI
selection_reason: single-domain core library bead, codex implements per user direction, claude supervises
validations: rp-mini index . : 40 files/14 dirs in 0.017s, idempotent, valid catalog.json
notes: Supervisor re-ran all gates. iOS preset: .xcodeproj fully ignored, .xcassets kept as single node. Chokidar deferred; lazy grammars moved to bead 4.

title: Nav tools: file_search, read_file, get_file_tree + relevance ranker
selection_reason: multi-module core bead but no contract/security/deploy impact; codex implements per user direction, claude supervises
validations: linked-transport smoke: file_search limit_hit=false, read_file tail -5 returns 5 lines, tree auto=530 tokens < 10k cap
notes: Supervisor re-ran all gates. Watch item for bead 12: rg receives catalog-approved path list (ignore parity) — needs ARG_MAX strategy on very large repos.

title: Codemaps v1: extraction, cache, type index, get_code_structure
selection_reason: core differentiating feature, multi-module but no contract/security/deploy guardrails; codex implements, claude supervises
validations: index cold: 28 computed/26 gated; warm: 28 cached/0 computed
get_code_structure returns getCatalog L77 / buildCatalog L92 / verifyFresh L118
notes: Supervisor re-ran gates + cold/warm cache smoke. Deviation: @vscode/tree-sitter-wasm (tree-sitter-wasms failed web-tree-sitter 0.26 probe). AST traversal instead of compiled .scm queries — structural parity with CE goldens, not byte parity. Bead 9 hardens edge cases.
